creator: Alex.Bakhtin@gmail.com
text:
Torsten,

    I'm sorry, I have to decline your patch. Jump from 1.001000 to 1.001003 is relatively complex, your patch doesn't addess all issues. Chanking Makefile.pl is not enougth. I looked at the new module code in the beginning of August, and discovered that much more work should be done to bump version.

    I'm going to bump this port version when I'll have time. 

    Thank you.

Alex Bakhtin
